policies.name: Production: require approval for all writes
policies.description: Any write operation in production requires human approval

policies.name: Production: deny destructive operations
policies.description: No agent can perform delete/destroy operations in production

policies.name: Production: deny infrastructure destruction
policies.description: No agent can destroy infrastructure in production

policies.name: Production: restrict data classification
policies.description: Only agents with confidential clearance can operate on production data
